{"type":"seqgraph","mermaid":"sequenceDiagram participant Consumer as Mesh Consumer (PullRecords) participant UV as Ultravisor Coordinator participant BP as BeaconProvider participant MP as MeadowProxy Request handler participant RS as RestServer (localhost) Consumer->>UV: Work item - MeadowProxy.Request
(Method=GET, Path=/1.0/spec/Entity/0/100) UV->>BP: route to beacon BP->>MP: invoke Request handler MP->>MP: check allowlist + writes gate MP->>RS: loopback HTTP GET 127.0.0.1:8390 RS-->>MP: 200 JSON array MP-->>UV: Outputs { Status, Body } UV-->>Consumer: records ","style":"notebook"}
